title: Loncomelos bungei

intro: Loncomelos bungei, also known as the "Golden Tree," is a plant species native to the Andean region, belonging to the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Loncomelos bungei include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
